title: Retail Associate
description:
Retail Store Associate (IP Collectibles / Lifestyle Retail)

About the Role

We are supporting the launch of a new overseas flagship retail store in Singapore, specialising in IP-inspired collectibles, creative merchandise, and lifestyle products.

As a Retail Store Associate, you will support the Store Manager in daily store operations, sales execution, and customer experience. You will play an important role in bringing IP stories and products to life through engaging service and product presentation.

Key Responsibilities

Store Operations & Sales Support

  • Support daily store operations to ensure smooth execution and achievement of sales targets.

  • Assist with product display, stock monitoring, replenishment, and basic inventory control.

  • Maintain store cleanliness, organisation, and adherence to brand standards.

  • Support sales activities and customer engagement to improve conversion and in-store experience.

  • Step in as the point of contact on the shop floor when required, ensuring operations run smoothly in the Store Manager’s absence.

Customer Experience & Brand Activities

  • Deliver friendly, professional, and customer-focused service.

  • Share product features, concepts, and IP background with customers where appropriate.

  • Support in-store promotions, new product launches, and brand or collaboration events.

  • Gather customer feedback and relay insights to the store leadership team.

Requirements

  • At least 1 year of retail experience in a customer-facing environment (e.g. lifestyle, specialty retail, toys, fashion, or creative brands).

  • Positive attitude with a strong sense of responsibility and teamwork.

  • Good communication skills and a service-oriented mindset.

  • Ability to work retail shifts, including weekends and public holidays.

  • Comfortable communicating in English; ability to converse in Mandarin is an advantage due to work coordination needs.

  • Interest in IP-inspired products, collectibles, toys, or creative merchandise is a plus.

What We Offer

  • Opportunity to be part of a new flagship store launch in Singapore.

  • Hands-on exposure to specialty retail and IP-based products.

  • Supportive team environment with learning and growth opportunities.

  • Competitive remuneration commensurate with experience.

postedCompany.description:
IntelliPro Group Inc. is one of the fastest growing IT services and HR solutions companies in Americas & APAC. We provide comprehensive IT services to help clients with IT Strategic Planning, Implementation, Deployment, IT Support on Artificial Intelligence, Big Data, Cloud Computing, Mobile Application Development, Data Mining and Business Intelligence, Enterprise Data Warehouse, and more.   


Besides our established IT services, our new business now is quickly extending to one-stop HR Solution Services, including Oversea Branch Setup Consulting, Compensation & Benefits Policy Consulting, Payroll Management Service, Talent Recruiting, and Employer Branding to satisfy our clients’ fast business expansion requirement. 


We have built our business on our company-wide commitment to continually overdeliver on the high expectations of our clients, employees, and business partners. The secret to our success is that our unified team works harder, faster, smarter, and more collaboratively than anyone else in the talent acquisition business. In addition to the immense talent and proprietary technology, IntelliPro Group is proud to offer continual professional development and extraordinary benefits to both consultants and full-time employees.
